name: oracle
description: Ask ChatGPT Pro (GPT-5.5 Pro) from Codex through the user's logged-in Chrome session.

interface.longDescription: Use the Chrome plugin / Codex Chrome Extension against the user's logged-in Chrome ChatGPT session, select and verify Pro (GPT-5.5 Pro / Extended Pro), ask one focused second-opinion prompt, wait without canceling for duration alone, and summarize the useful answer back into Codex.
defaultPrompt: Ask Oracle for a GPT-5.5 Pro second opinion
Run this decision by GPT-5.5 Pro
Use Oracle to sanity-check this implementation
